column1: # One scenario per row. Tab-separated. Lines starting with # are comments.
#   name     — short scenario id (used for baseline directory name)
#   file     — path relative to repo root
#   options  — ltl options (excluding --disable-progress and the input file)
# Three canonical option-set families per file (chosen to exercise different
# code paths that affect percentile calculation):
#   daily         — large bucket, ranked by mean        (-bs 1440 -n 25 -so mean -o)
#   time-sorted   — small bucket, ranked by duration    (-bs 60 -n 25 -so duration -o)
